title: notoceras bicorne var. prostratum
intro: Notoceras bicorne var. prostratum, also known as the two-horned cactus or prostrate two-horned cactus, is a rare and lesser-known species of cactus that belongs to the Notocactus genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits associated with Notoceras bicorne var. prostratum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties, which can help to reduce pain, prevent infections, and eliminate parasites from the body. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the stems and leaves, and then using them in teas, tinctures, or topical ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
